overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a Harry Potter video game depicting the Great Hall of Hogwarts. Students in robes dine at long wooden house tables beneath thousands of floating candles, with gothic stone architecture and high vaulted ceilings creating a magical atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: great hall dining room with house tables and floating candles

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the dining hall from the entrance area, overlooking the central aisle

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes eating at the Gryffindor table on the right side of the banner
group of students dining and conversing at the left house table

entered.detail: hundreds of lit candles suspended in mid-air providing warm illumination throughout the hall
tall stone walls with gothic architectural details and vertical columns
tall stone walls with gothic architectural details matching the left side
lengthy wooden dining tables lined with students and food platters
lengthy wooden dining tables parallel to the left tables, filled with dining students
red and gold embroidered banner with lion crest hanging on the nearest table
tall gothic windows with stone tracery allowing dim exterior light
tall gothic windows with stone tracery on the right wall
grey stone tile flooring with visible grout lines running down the central aisle

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of the Hogwarts Great Hall from a video game, showcasing the iconic dining chamber with floating candles illuminating long wooden house tables. Students in wizarding robes dine and converse along both sides of the central aisle, while a prominent Gryffindor banner hangs on the nearest table. The gothic stone architecture features tall arched windows and soaring ceilings, creating an atmospheric magical environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic view of the Hogwarts Great Hall, capturing the immersive scale of the magical dining chamber. It begins by focusing on the long wooden house tables where students in wizarding robes dine and converse, with a prominent Gryffindor banner marking the foreground. As the eye travels upward, the warm glow of thousands of floating candles illuminates the central aisle and the surrounding gothic stone architecture. The scene finally expands to reveal the soaring vaulted ceilings and tall arched windows, completing the atmospheric depiction of the iconic hall.
